project.name: BaseTestEngine
project.description: A Windows C++20 learning/experimental project for engine development practice using CMake with MSVC. Modules: Main (executable), Algorithm (DLL), Transfer (DLL), Core (DLL), DirectX12 (DLL). Includes embedded AngelScript scripting engine.

nodes.name: CMakeLists.txt
nodes.summary: CMake build script for the Algorithm shared DLL. Uses GLOB_RECURSE to collect all sources, defines ALGORITHM_LIBRARY for the ALGOMODULE export macro, and exposes ModulePublic as the public include directory.

nodes.name: Sort.cpp
nodes.summary: Implementation file for sorting algorithms. Provides TestClass::testfunc() and SelectSort() (selection sort on std::vector<int>). Other sort implementations (insertion, shell, merge) are defined inline in the header.

nodes.name: Sort.h
nodes.summary: Public header declaring and implementing multiple sorting algorithms: SelectSort (exported via ALGOMODULE), InsertSort, ShellSort, Merge, MergeSorUpDown, and MergeSortDownUp. Also declares TestClass with ALGOMODULE export. Contains Chinese-language algorithm comments.

nodes.name: Module.h
nodes.summary: Defines the ALGOMODULE DLL import/export macro. When ALGORITHM_LIBRARY is defined (building the DLL), ALGOMODULE expands to __declspec(dllexport); otherwise __declspec(dllimport).

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Project guidance document for Claude Code. Describes the BaseTestEngine architecture (Main exe, Algorithm DLL, Transfer DLL), build commands using CMake + Ninja, key conventions (DLL macros, public/private headers, C++20, Windows-only), and code style notes.

nodes.name: CMakeLists.txt
nodes.summary: Root CMake build script for BaseTestEngine. Sets C++20 standard, configures output directories to ../out/bin/, defines NOMINMAX/SYSTEM_WIN/PLATFORM_WIN, and adds subdirectories for Core, Algorithm, DirectX12, and Main (Transfer is commented out).

nodes.name: CMakeSettings.json
nodes.summary: Visual Studio CMake settings file defining two build configurations: x64-Debug and x64-Release (RelWithDebInfo), both using Visual Studio 18 2026 generator with MSVC x64 environment.

nodes.name: Atomic.h
nodes.summary: Thin alias header wrapping std::atomic<T> as TAtomic<T> for use throughout the Core module.

nodes.name: BaseDefines.cpp
nodes.summary: Defines global thread-id variables GGameThreadId and GRenderThreadId (both uint32) declared extern in BaseDefines.h.

nodes.name: BaseDefines.h
nodes.summary: Core utility definitions: extern globals GGameThreadId/GRenderThreadId, NONCOPYABLE macro, verify() assertion macro (debug/release variants that abort or log), task thread creation flags (CREATE_HIPRI_TASK_THREADS, CREATE_BACKGROUND_TASK_THREADS), and FNoncopyable base class.

nodes.name: GenericPlatform.h
nodes.summary: Platform abstraction layer header. Defines FGenericPlatformTypes with all fundamental integer/character typedefs, SelectIntPointerType template for pointer-size selection, FWindowsPlatformTypes (Windows-specific), FPlatformTypes alias, calling convention macros (FORCEINLINE, CDECL, etc.), and type aliases (FString, FTimespan, TFunction, TRefCountPtr, PLATFORM_CACHE_LINE_SIZE).

nodes.name: GenericPlatformProcess.cpp
nodes.summary: Implementation of FGenericPlatformProcess and FWindowsPlatformProcess. Includes Windows thread naming (SetThreadName/SetThreadDescription via MSVC SEH and kernel32 API), thread affinity, sleep, CPU core counting via GetLogicalProcessorInformationEx (NUMA/hyperthreading aware), synchronization event pool access, and runnable thread creation.

nodes.name: GenericPlatformProcess.h
nodes.summary: Declares FGenericPlatformProcess (multithreading support, event pool, task graph masks) and FWindowsPlatformProcess (thread creation, sync events, affinity, naming, sleep, core counting, memory barrier). Aliases FPlatformProcess to FWindowsPlatformProcess on Windows.

nodes.name: NumericLimit.h
nodes.summary: Defines MIN/MAX macros for all integer and float types (uint8 through int64, flt, dbl), and provides TNumericLimits<T> as an alias for std::numeric_limits<T>.

nodes.name: CMakeLists.txt
nodes.summary: CMake build script for the Core shared DLL. Collects all sources via GLOB_RECURSE, defines Core_LIBRARY for COREMODULE macro, exposes the entire Core directory as a public include path, and suppresses LIBCMT/LIBCMTD linker conflicts.

nodes.name: LogAssert.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements InitializeLogAssert() (grabs Windows console handle into __LoghConsole) and InitLogFile() (opens a file for unbuffered log output into GLogFile).

nodes.name: LogAssert.h
nodes.summary: Logging macro header providing LogStringMsg, DebugStringMsg, WarningStringMsg, ErrorStringMsg (plain output) and LogTraceMsg, DebugTraceMsg, WarningTraceMsg, ErrorTraceMsg (with file/line info). Windows variant uses SetConsoleTextAttribute for colored output; non-Windows uses ANSI escape codes. Declares GLogFile and InitLogFile.

nodes.name: Core.h
nodes.summary: Umbrella header for the Core module. Includes CoreModule.h and all primary Base headers: GenericPlatform.h, NumericLimit.h, GenericPlatformProcess.h, and BaseDefines.h.

nodes.name: CoreModule.h
nodes.summary: Defines the COREMODULE DLL import/export macro. When Core_LIBRARY is defined (building the DLL), expands to __declspec(dllexport); otherwise __declspec(dllimport).

nodes.name: AnyTaskThread.cpp
nodes.summary: Implementation of FTaskThreadAnyThread. Drives the task processing loop: waits on StallRestartEvent when idle, executes tasks via FBaseGraphTask::Execute(), handles background thread priority yielding, and finds work via FTaskGraphImplementation::Get().FindWork().

nodes.name: AnyTaskThread.h
nodes.summary: Declares FTaskThreadAnyThread, a task thread worker for unnamed (AnyThread) tasks. Contains FThreadTaskQueue (StallRestartEvent, RecursionGuard, QuitForShutdown) and overrides ProcessTasksUntilQuit, ProcessTasksUntilIdle, RequestQuit, WakeUp, IsProcessingTasks.

nodes.name: DelegateGraphTask.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements static factory methods CreateAndDispatchWhenReady for both FSimpleDelegateGraphTask (void()) and FDelegateGraphTask (void(ENamedThreads::Type, FGraphEventRef)) via TGraphTask template dispatch.

nodes.name: DelegateGraphTask.h
nodes.summary: Declares FSimpleDelegateGraphTask (wraps std::function<void()>) and FDelegateGraphTask (wraps std::function<void(ENamedThreads::Type, FGraphEventRef)>). Both are task graph task types with CreateAndDispatchWhenReady factory methods and DoTask execution entry points.

nodes.name: FunctionGraphTask.cpp
nodes.summary: Minimal implementation file that only includes FunctionGraphTask.h. All logic is in the header via templates.

nodes.name: FunctionGraphTask.h
nodes.summary: Defines TFunctionGraphTaskImpl<Signature, SubsequentsMode> template class wrapping std::function with DoTaskImpl overloads for void(), void(FGraphEventRef), and void(ENamedThreads::Type, FGraphEventRef) signatures. FFunctionGraphTask struct provides static CreateAndDispatchWhenReady factory methods.

nodes.name: TestClass
nodes.summary: Simple DLL-exported test class with a private int member and a testfunc() method that increments and prints the member. Primarily used to verify DLL export machinery.

nodes.name: FGenericPlatformTypes
nodes.summary: Struct containing all fundamental platform type definitions (uint8 through int64, character types ANSICHAR/WIDECHAR/CHAR8/16/32, pointer-sized integers UPTRINT/PTRINT, SIZE_T/SSIZE_T, and nullptr type).

nodes.name: FWindowsPlatformTypes
nodes.summary: Windows-specific platform types inheriting FGenericPlatformTypes, overriding SIZE_T and SSIZE_T for 32/64-bit Windows.

nodes.name: FGenericPlatformProcess
nodes.summary: Base platform process abstraction struct. Provides SupportsMultithreading(), ReturnSynchEventToPool(), and task graph thread mask queries. Exported via COREMODULE.

nodes.name: FWindowsPlatformProcess
nodes.summary: Windows-specific platform process implementation inheriting FGenericPlatformProcess. Provides thread creation, sync event management, CPU affinity/naming, sleep, memory barrier, and core count queries. Aliased as FPlatformProcess on Windows.

nodes.name: FNoncopyable
nodes.summary: Utility base class that prevents copy construction and copy assignment via private deleted special members. Intended for protected-constructor inheritance.

nodes.name: FTaskThreadAnyThread
nodes.summary: Task thread worker for unnamed (AnyThread) tasks in the task graph system. Inherits FTaskThreadBase. Manages a FThreadTaskQueue with a stall event and processes tasks in a loop, supporting quit/wakeup/idle signaling and priority-based yielding.

nodes.name: FSimpleDelegateGraphTask
nodes.summary: Task graph task wrapping a std::function<void()> delegate. Provides DoTask() and static CreateAndDispatchWhenReady() factory for prerequisite-based dispatch.

nodes.name: FDelegateGraphTask
nodes.summary: Task graph task wrapping a std::function<void(ENamedThreads::Type, FGraphEventRef)> delegate, passing current thread and completion event to the delegate on execution.

nodes.name: TFunctionGraphTaskImpl
nodes.summary: Template task graph task implementation parameterized on function signature and SubsequentsMode. Uses SFINAE-style DoTaskImpl overloads to dispatch void(), void(FGraphEventRef), or void(ENamedThreads::Type, FGraphEventRef) functions.

nodes.name: FFunctionGraphTask
nodes.summary: Static factory struct providing CreateAndDispatchWhenReady overloads that instantiate TFunctionGraphTaskImpl for void() and void(ENamedThreads::Type, FGraphEventRef) function signatures.

nodes.name: SelectSort
nodes.summary: DLL-exported selection sort on std::vector<int>. Finds the minimum element in the unsorted portion and swaps it forward. O(N^2/2) time, not stable.

nodes.name: InsertSort
nodes.summary: Insertion sort on std::vector<int>. Stable sort that performs well on nearly sorted input. Defined inline in the header.

nodes.name: ShellSort
nodes.summary: Shell sort on std::vector<int>. Uses Knuth gap sequence (h = 3h+1). Non-stable sort that generalizes insertion sort with varying gap sizes.

nodes.name: Merge
nodes.summary: Merges two sorted halves of arr[lo..mid] and arr[mid+1..hi] into arr using a temp buffer. Stable when equal elements prefer the left half.

nodes.name: MergeSorUpDown
nodes.summary: Top-down recursive merge sort. Splits array in half, recursively sorts each half, then merges. Requires a temp buffer of the same size.

nodes.name: NamedTaskThread.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FNamedTaskThread methods: enqueuing tasks from same or other threads, processing task loops (until quit or idle), waking and quitting named threads. Handles render thread polling via global GRenderThreadPollingOn/GRenderThreadPollPeriodMs flags.

nodes.name: NamedTaskThread.h
nodes.summary: Declares FNamedTaskThread, a concrete TaskThreadBase subclass for named threads (GameThread, RenderThread, etc.). Contains FThreadTaskQueue inner struct holding FStallingTaskQueue, recursion guard, quit flags, and a stall-restart FEvent. Supports two queues per thread.

nodes.name: NullGraphTask.cpp
nodes.summary: Minimal translation unit that includes NullGraphTask.h. No additional implementation.

nodes.name: NullGraphTask.h
nodes.summary: Declares FNullGraphTask, a placeholder/barrier task used to aggregate prerequisites. It does no real work in DoTask but tracks subsequents, serving as a synchronization gather point in the task graph.

nodes.name: ReturnGraphTask.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FReturnGraphTask: constructor asserts non-AnyThread, DoTask calls FTaskGraphInterface::RequestReturn to unblock a named thread's ProcessThreadUntilRequestReturn loop.

nodes.name: ReturnGraphTask.h
nodes.summary: Declares FReturnGraphTask, a special task that signals a named thread to exit its ProcessThreadUntilRequestReturn loop. Used to implement cooperative return-to-caller semantics in the task graph.

nodes.name: StallingTaskQueue.h
nodes.summary: Template class FStallingTaskQueue<T, NumPriorities>: a lock-based multi-priority task queue using std::priority_queue per priority. Uses a 64-bit atomic masterState bitfield to track stalled worker threads; Push wakes a stalled thread, Pop optionally marks caller as stalled when empty.

nodes.name: TaskGraphImplementation.cpp
nodes.summary: Full implementation of FTaskGraphImplementation singleton: constructor builds and starts all named and worker threads across priority sets, destructor shuts them down. Implements QueueTask (routing to named or any-thread queues), FindWork, WaitUntilTasksComplete, TriggerEventWhenTasksComplete, and other scheduling operations.

nodes.name: TaskGraphImplementation.h
nodes.summary: Declares FTaskGraphImplementation, the concrete singleton implementing FTaskGraphInterface. Manages arrays of FWorkerThread, per-priority FStallingTaskQueues for AnyThread tasks, TLS slot for thread identity, and exposes scheduling, tuning, and lifecycle APIs.

nodes.name: TaskGraphInterfaces.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FTaskGraphInterface static methods (Get, Startup, Shutdown, IsRunning, IsMultithread), global render-thread polling variables, and FGraphEvent methods (CreateGraphEvent, DispatchSubsequents, Recycle, destructor). DispatchSubsequents spawns a FNullGraphTask barrier when DontCompleteUntil prerequisites exist.

nodes.name: TaskGraphInterfaces.h
nodes.summary: Core task graph header defining: ENamedThreads bitfield enum with thread index, queue, task-priority, and thread-priority encoding; ESubsequentsMode; FTaskGraphInterface abstract base; FBaseGraphTask with lifecycle state machine; FGraphEvent for dependency tracking; TGraphTask<TTask> template wrapping user tasks with prerequisite/subsequent management; FCustomStatIDGraphTaskBase stub.

nodes.name: TaskThreadBase.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FTaskThreadBase: constructor, Setup (stores thread id and TLS slot), InitializeForCurrentThread (writes FWorkerThread* to TLS), Run (calls ProcessTasksUntilQuit), Stop (calls RequestQuit), Tick (calls ProcessTasksUntilIdle). Acts as the FRunnable adapter for the task graph thread loop.

nodes.name: TaskThreadBase.h
nodes.summary: Declares abstract FTaskThreadBase, multiply inheriting FRunnable and FSingleThreadRunnable. Defines the common interface for named and any-thread task workers: Setup, InitializeForCurrentThread, ProcessTasksUntilQuit/Idle, Enqueue, RequestQuit, WakeUp, IsProcessingTasks.

nodes.name: TriggerEventGraphTask.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FTriggerEventGraphTask constructor and DoTask (calls Event->Trigger()). Used to signal an FEvent when all prerequisite tasks complete.

nodes.name: TriggerEventGraphTask.h
nodes.summary: Declares FTriggerEventGraphTask: a graph task that triggers an FEvent when executed. Used by TriggerEventWhenTasksComplete to bridge the task graph to blocking event waits.

nodes.name: WorkerThread.h
nodes.summary: Declares FWorkerThread POD-like struct holding a FTaskThreadBase* (task logic), FRunnableThread* (OS thread handle), and bAttached flag. Aggregates per-thread state for the task graph scheduler.

nodes.name: Event.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FEventWin (Trigger/Reset/Wait via Win32 SetEvent/ResetEvent/WaitForSingleObject) and FScopedEvent (auto-acquire from FEventPool on construction, release on destruction with optional IsReady poll).

nodes.name: Event.h
nodes.summary: Defines the FEvent abstract base (Create, Trigger, Reset, Wait), FEventWin (Win32 HANDLE-based implementation), FSingleThreadEvent (non-blocking stub for single-thread mode), and FScopedEvent (RAII wrapper that acquires/releases from FEventPool). Supports auto-reset and manual-reset modes.

nodes.name: EventPool.h
nodes.summary: Declares FSafeRecyclableEvent (FEvent wrapper that proxies to an inner event) and FEventPool<PoolType> template singleton that caches FEvent instances with a forward_list and FCriticalSection, reducing allocation overhead for frequently created/destroyed events.

nodes.name: Runnable.h
nodes.summary: Declares FRunnable interface with Init, Run (pure virtual), Stop, Exit, and GetSingleThreadInterface. Base class for all thread task implementations.

nodes.name: RunnableThread.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FRunnableThread: static TLS slot allocation, Create (dispatches to platform thread or FFakeThread), SetupCreatedThread, SetTls/FreeTls. Implements FFakeThread: fake thread ID counter with reserved high bit, Tick delegates to FSingleThreadRunnable, CreateInternal stores runnable for single-thread simulation.

nodes.name: RunnableThread.h
nodes.summary: Declares FRunnableThread (abstract OS thread wrapper with Create factory, priority, suspend, kill, TLS management), FSingleThreadRunnable (Tick interface for single-thread simulation), and FFakeThread (fake thread implementation for single-threaded mode using FSingleThreadRunnable).

nodes.name: ScopeLock.h
nodes.summary: Provides RAII locking primitives: FScopeLock (scoped critical section lock), FScopeUnlock (scoped unlock), FReadScopeLock and FWriteScopeLock for FRWLock, and FRWScopeLock<LockType> template that selects read or write scope lock via SelectLockType specializations.

nodes.name: ThreadConfig.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements GetNoAffinityMask(), returning 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF to indicate no CPU affinity restriction.

nodes.name: ThreadConfig.h
nodes.summary: Declares EThreadPriority enum (TimeCritical through Lowest) and EThreadCreateFlags (None, SMTExclusive), plus GetNoAffinityMask(). Provides thread creation configuration types used across the threading subsystem.

nodes.name: FNamedTaskThread
nodes.summary: Concrete task thread for specifically named threads (GameThread, RenderThread, etc.). Manages two FThreadTaskQueue instances with FStallingTaskQueue, stall events, and recursion guards.

nodes.name: FNullGraphTask
nodes.summary: No-op graph task used as a barrier/gather point. TrackSubsequents mode ensures downstream tasks are properly chained.

nodes.name: FReturnGraphTask
nodes.summary: Graph task that signals a named thread to return from its blocking ProcessThreadUntilRequestReturn loop via FTaskGraphInterface::RequestReturn.

nodes.name: FStallingTaskQueue
nodes.summary: Template multi-priority task queue. Uses per-priority std::priority_queue with FRWLock, and a 64-bit atomic masterState to track and wake stalled worker threads via bit manipulation.

nodes.name: FTaskGraphImplementation
nodes.summary: Singleton concrete implementation of FTaskGraphInterface. Manages the full array of worker threads (named + any-thread pools across priorities), TLS-based current-thread identification, AnyThread task routing, and shutdown callback registry.

nodes.name: FTaskGraphInterface
nodes.summary: Abstract interface for the task graph system. Provides Startup/Shutdown lifecycle, QueueTask, WaitUntilTasksComplete, TriggerEventWhenTasksComplete, ProcessThreadUntilIdle/RequestReturn, AttachToThread, and thread identity queries.

nodes.name: FBaseGraphTask
nodes.summary: Base class for all tasks in the task graph. Tracks ThreadToExecuteOn, prerequisite count (atomic), and a debug life-stage enum. Provides ConditionalQueueTask and PrerequisitesComplete for dependency resolution.

nodes.name: FGraphEvent
nodes.summary: Represents the completion event of a graph task. Holds a SubsequentList of dependent tasks, an EventsToWaitFor list for DontCompleteUntil, and an atomic IsClosed flag. DispatchSubsequents triggers downstream tasks or spawns a FNullGraphTask barrier.

nodes.name: TGraphTask
nodes.summary: Template wrapper that embeds a user TTask via placement-new in aligned storage. Implements prerequisite tracking, subsequent dispatch, and provides CreateTask/ConstructAndDispatchWhenReady/ConstructAndHold factory API via inner FConstructor class.

nodes.name: FTaskThreadBase
nodes.summary: Abstract base for task thread implementations, inheriting FRunnable and FSingleThreadRunnable. Stores thread ID, TLS slot, stall atomic, new-task buffer, and owner FWorkerThread. Bridges OS thread lifecycle to task processing loops.

nodes.name: FTriggerEventGraphTask
nodes.summary: Graph task that calls FEvent::Trigger() when executed. Used by FTaskGraphImplementation::TriggerEventWhenTasksComplete to unblock threads waiting on FScopedEvent.

nodes.name: FWorkerThread
nodes.summary: Lightweight aggregate struct pairing a FTaskThreadBase* (logic) with a FRunnableThread* (OS handle) and a bAttached flag.

nodes.name: FEvent
nodes.summary: Abstract synchronization event interface with Create, Trigger, Reset, Wait. Base for FEventWin, FSingleThreadEvent.

nodes.name: FEventWin
nodes.summary: Windows-specific FEvent implementation wrapping a Win32 HANDLE. Supports auto-reset and manual-reset modes via CreateEvent/SetEvent/ResetEvent/WaitForSingleObject.

nodes.name: FScopedEvent
nodes.summary: RAII event wrapper that borrows an FEvent from FEventPool on construction and returns it on destruction (after waiting). Provides Trigger, Get, and IsReady for scoped signaling patterns.

nodes.name: FEventPool
nodes.summary: Template singleton event pool keyed by EEventPoolTypes (AutoReset/ManualReset). Maintains a forward_list of FEvent* and a FCriticalSection. GetEventFromPool wraps returned events in FSafeRecyclableEvent; ReturnToPool unwraps and resets them.

nodes.name: FSafeRecyclableEvent
nodes.summary: FEvent decorator that wraps an inner FEvent and proxies all calls to it. Enables the pool to safely recycle inner events without the consumer holding a raw pool pointer.

nodes.name: FRunnable
nodes.summary: Interface for thread-runnable logic: Init, Run (pure virtual), Stop, Exit, GetSingleThreadInterface. All thread task implementations ultimately inherit from this.

nodes.name: FRunnableThread
nodes.summary: Abstract OS thread wrapper. Provides static Create factory (dispatches to platform impl or FFakeThread), TLS slot for current-thread retrieval, and abstract interface for SetThreadPriority, Suspend, Kill, WaitForCompletion.

nodes.name: FFakeThread
nodes.summary: Single-threaded simulation of a runnable thread. Assigns a fake thread ID with a reserved high bit, delegates Tick to FSingleThreadRunnable. Used when multithreading is not supported.

nodes.name: FSingleThreadRunnable
nodes.summary: Interface for single-threaded simulation; exposes Tick() which is called by FFakeThread to drive task processing without a real OS thread.

nodes.name: FScopeLock
nodes.summary: RAII wrapper for FCriticalSection: locks on construction, unlocks on destruction or manual Unlock(). Non-copyable by design.

nodes.name: FRWScopeLock
nodes.summary: Template RAII read-write lock scope. Selects FReadScopeLock or FWriteScopeLock at compile time via SelectLockType specialization based on FRWScopeLockType template parameter.

nodes.name: ENamedThreads::Type
nodes.summary: Bitfield enum encoding thread index, queue index, task priority, and thread priority. Defines named thread IDs (RHIThread, AudioThread, GameThread, ActualRenderingThread, AnyThread) and combination constants.

nodes.name: ESubsequentsMode::Type
nodes.summary: Controls whether a graph task tracks subsequent dependents (TrackSubsequents) or is fire-and-forget (FireAndForget).

nodes.name: EThreadPriority
nodes.summary: Thread priority levels from TimeCritical to Lowest, used to set OS scheduler priority when creating runnable threads.

nodes.name: EThreadCreateFlags
nodes.summary: Flags for thread creation: None (default) and SMTExclusive (restrict thread to exclusive SMT core).

nodes.name: EEventPoolTypes
nodes.summary: Selects event pool mode: AutoReset or ManualReset, used as template parameter to FEventPool.

nodes.name: ThreadManager.cpp
nodes.summary: Implementation of FThreadManager singleton. Manages a map of thread IDs to FRunnableThread pointers, with lock-guarded add/remove/iteration. Also provides fake-thread ticking for single-threaded environments and thread name lookup.

nodes.name: ThreadManager.h
nodes.summary: Header for FThreadManager: a singleton class that tracks all FRunnableThread instances, provides name lookup, tick support for fake threads, and per-platform stack trace structures.

nodes.name: TlsAutoCleanup.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FTlsAutoCleanup::Register(), which adds the instance to the current FRunnableThread's TLS cleanup list.

nodes.name: TlsAutoCleanup.h
nodes.summary: Defines FTlsAutoCleanup (base class for objects that auto-clean on thread exit) and TTlsAutoCleanupValue<T> template which stores a typed value per thread.

nodes.name: WindowsRunnableThread.cpp
nodes.summary: Windows-specific implementation of FRunnableThreadWin. Manages Win32 thread creation via CreateThread, thread priority translation, suspend/resume, kill, and the thread entry point _ThreadProc that registers the thread with FThreadManager.

nodes.name: WindowsRunnableThread.h
nodes.summary: Header for FRunnableThreadWin, the Windows platform-specific runnable thread class. Declares the static _ThreadProc entry point and overrides for all FRunnableThread virtual methods.

nodes.name: WindowsSyncUtils.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements FWindowsSystemWideCriticalSection: a system-wide named mutex using Win32 CreateMutex. Handles already-owned mutex by optionally waiting via WaitForSingleObject.

nodes.name: WindowsSyncUtils.h
nodes.summary: Windows threading synchronization primitives: FWindowsCriticalSection (CRITICAL_SECTION with spin count), FWindowsSystemWideCriticalSection (named mutex), FWindowsRWLock (SRWLOCK), and FWindowsPlatformTLS (TLS slot management). Typedefs map platform types to generic names.

nodes.name: CMakeLists.txt
nodes.summary: CMake build script for the DirectX12 shared library. Collects all sources recursively, creates a SHARED library, sets DirectX12_LIBRARY compile definition, and links against Core, winmm, d3d12, dxgi, and d3dcompiler.

nodes.name: BoxApp.cpp
nodes.summary: Chapter 6 box application implementation. Defines Vertex and ObjectConstants structs under CHAPTER_6 guard. Implements FillInputLayout() to describe position+color vertex elements for D3D12 input assembler.

nodes.name: BoxApp.h
nodes.summary: Header for BoxApp, a D3DApp subclass for rendering a colored box (DirectX12 Book Chapter 6). Declares the standard D3DApp virtual overrides and an InputLayout member.

nodes.name: InitDirect3D.cpp
nodes.summary: Implementation of InitDirect3DApp: a minimal D3DApp subclass. Draw() demonstrates the full per-frame command list workflow: reset, resource barriers, clear views, set render targets, close, execute, present, and flush.

nodes.name: InitDirect3D.h
nodes.summary: Header for InitDirect3DApp, a DXMODULE-exported D3DApp subclass used in the DirectX 12 initialization learning chapter.

nodes.name: D3DApp.cpp
nodes.summary: Core Direct3D 12 application framework implementation. Manages Win32 window, message loop, D3D12 device, command objects, swap chain, descriptor heaps, MSAA, fence-based GPU synchronization, and per-frame stats/logging.

nodes.name: D3DApp.h
nodes.summary: Header for the D3DApp base class: a DXMODULE-exported singleton providing the DirectX 12 application framework with window management, device/resource lifecycle, and virtual hooks for subclass rendering logic.

nodes.name: D3DUtil.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DxException (HRESULT error reporting) and D3DUtil::CreateDefaultBuffer (uploads CPU data to a GPU default heap via an upload buffer). Also implements MeshGeometry view accessors and DisposeUploaders.

nodes.name: D3DUtil.h
nodes.summary: D3D12 utility types and helpers. Defines DxException, ThrowIfFailed macro, D3DUtil static helper class, SubMeshGeometry, and MeshGeometry (CPU+GPU buffer management for geometry).

nodes.name: GameTimer.cpp
nodes.summary: Frank Luna's GameTimer implementation using QueryPerformanceCounter for high-resolution timing. Tracks total time (excluding pauses) and per-frame delta time.

nodes.name: GameTimer.h
nodes.summary: Header for GameTimer: a high-resolution timer class supporting pause/resume, total elapsed time, and per-frame delta time.

nodes.name: MathHelper.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements MathHelper static methods: AngleFromXY (atan2 with quadrant adjustment), RandUnitVec3, and RandHemisphereUnitVec3.

nodes.name: MathHelper.h
nodes.summary: DXMODULE-exported MathHelper class with static math utilities for game/graphics: random number generation, Min/Max/Lerp/Clamp templates, spherical-to-Cartesian conversion, inverse-transpose matrix, identity matrix, and random vector generation.

nodes.name: d3dx12.h
nodes.summary: Microsoft D3DX12 utility library header. Provides C++ helper structs and functions extending the D3D12 API: CD3DX12_RECT, CD3DX12_RESOURCE_BARRIER, CD3DX12_CPU_DESCRIPTOR_HANDLE, CD3DX12_HEAP_PROPERTIES, CD3DX12_RESOURCE_DESC, and others.

nodes.name: DXModule.h
nodes.summary: Defines the DXMODULE macro for DLL export/import control of the DirectX12 module.

nodes.name: aswrappedcall.h
nodes.summary: AngelScript automatic wrapper header. Provides template metaprogramming infrastructure in namespace gw to adapt arbitrary C++ functions (free, member, const member) to the AngelScript generic calling convention (asIScriptGeneric).

nodes.name: generateheader.cpp
nodes.summary: Code generator (main() commented out) that prints the aswrappedcall.h header content via printf. PrintTemplate and PrintConstructor functions emit template specializations for the AngelScript generic wrapper system.

nodes.name: FThreadManager
nodes.summary: Singleton thread registry. Maintains an unordered_map of ThreadId -> FRunnableThread*, supports adding/removing threads, ticking fake threads, and looking up thread names.

nodes.name: FTlsAutoCleanup
nodes.summary: Base class for objects that register themselves for automatic cleanup when their owning thread exits. Provides virtual destructor and Register() method.

nodes.name: TTlsAutoCleanupValue
nodes.summary: Template TLS value holder inheriting FTlsAutoCleanup. Stores a typed T value per thread with Get/Set accessors.

nodes.name: FRunnableThreadWin
nodes.summary: Windows platform implementation of FRunnableThread. Uses Win32 CreateThread, manages thread lifecycle (create, suspend, kill, wait), translates EThreadPriority to Win32 values.

nodes.name: FWindowsCriticalSection
nodes.summary: Windows CRITICAL_SECTION wrapper with spin count of 4000. Provides Lock/TryLock/Unlock methods.

nodes.name: FWindowsSystemWideCriticalSection
nodes.summary: System-wide named mutex wrapper using Win32 CreateMutex. Supports optional wait timeout and cross-process locking.

nodes.name: FWindowsRWLock
nodes.summary: Windows Slim Reader-Writer Lock (SRWLOCK) wrapper. Provides ReadLock/ReadUnlock and WriteLock/WriteUnlock.

nodes.name: FWindowsPlatformTLS
nodes.summary: Windows Thread-Local Storage utilities. Wraps TlsAlloc, TlsSetValue, TlsGetValue, TlsFree and GetCurrentThreadId.

nodes.name: D3DApp
nodes.summary: DirectX 12 application base class (singleton). Manages Win32 window, D3D12 device, command queue/list/allocator, swap chain, descriptor heaps, MSAA, GPU fence synchronization, and provides virtual hooks for subclass rendering.

nodes.name: BoxApp
nodes.summary: D3DApp subclass for the DirectX 12 book Chapter 6 box rendering exercise. Sets up vertex input layout for position+color.

nodes.name: InitDirect3DApp
nodes.summary: D3DApp subclass for the Direct3D initialization chapter. Demonstrates the per-frame command list workflow including resource barriers, clear, present, and flush.

nodes.name: GameTimer
nodes.summary: High-resolution game timer using Win32 QueryPerformanceCounter. Tracks total time (excluding pauses) and per-frame delta time.

nodes.name: MathHelper
nodes.summary: Static math utility class for DirectX12 graphics: random numbers, Min/Max/Lerp/Clamp, spherical coordinates, matrix math, and random vector sampling on sphere/hemisphere.

nodes.name: DxException
nodes.summary: Exception type for D3D12 HRESULT failures. Stores error code, function name, filename, and line number. ToString() uses _com_error for human-readable message.

nodes.name: D3DUtil
nodes.summary: Static utility class for D3D12 resource management. CreateDefaultBuffer uploads CPU data to a GPU default heap via an intermediate upload heap.

nodes.name: MeshGeometry
nodes.summary: Geometry data container holding CPU blobs and GPU resources for vertex and index buffers, plus a named sub-mesh map for draw calls.

nodes.name: SubMeshGeometry
nodes.summary: Describes a sub-region of a MeshGeometry's index/vertex buffers for instanced draw calls, including a bounding box.

nodes.name: angelscript.h
nodes.summary: Core AngelScript scripting engine public API header (version 2.33.0). Defines all abstract interface classes, enumerations, type definitions, function pointer helpers, and C API declarations for the AngelScript embedded scripting engine.

nodes.name: contextmgr.h
nodes.summary: Declares CContextMgr, a manager for multiple concurrent AngelScript execution contexts. Supports threading, co-routines, sleeping, and per-iteration script execution.

nodes.name: contextmgr.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CContextMgr including co-routine creation, sleep/yield mechanics, script execution loop, and garbage collection statistics tracking.

nodes.name: datetime.h
nodes.summary: Declares CDateTime class wrapping std::chrono::system_clock::time_point for use in AngelScript. Provides date/time accessors, setters, and arithmetic operators. Declares RegisterScriptDateTime.

nodes.name: datetime.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CDateTime including C++11 chrono-based time point manipulation, tm conversion helpers, arithmetic operators, and AngelScript registration via RegisterScriptDateTime.

nodes.name: debugger.h
nodes.summary: Declares CDebugger, an interactive script debugger with breakpoints, stepping modes, variable inspection, callstack printing, and pluggable ToString callbacks for custom types.

nodes.name: debugger.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CDebugger including command interpretation, breakpoint management, variable/member printing with recursive expansion, type-to-string conversion for all primitive and script object types.

nodes.name: scriptany.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptAny, a type-erased value container for AngelScript supporting integer, float, and object storage. Includes reference counting, GC callbacks, and registration functions.

nodes.name: scriptany.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptAny including generic calling convention wrappers, Store/Retrieve overloads, reference counting, GC integration, and native/generic registration paths.

nodes.name: scriptarray.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptArray, a generic reference-counted dynamic array for AngelScript. Supports sorting (including script-function comparator), find, insert/remove, GC, and configurable STL-compatible names.

nodes.name: scriptarray.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptArray with full buffer management, element construction/destruction, sorting algorithms (including script-function-based sort), GC enumeration, and both native and generic AngelScript registration.

nodes.name: scriptbuilder.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptBuilder, a preprocessor/builder for AngelScript scripts. Handles #include directives, #pragma callbacks, conditional compilation via DefineWord, and metadata extraction for types/functions/variables.

nodes.name: scriptbuilder.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptBuilder with script section loading from file and memory, include guard deduplication (case-insensitive on Windows), metadata declaration extraction, and preprocessor conditional handling.

nodes.name: scriptdictionary.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptDictionary (key-value store) and CScriptDictValue (polymorphic value wrapper). CScriptDictionary uses unordered_map for C++11 and provides an STL-style CIterator, plus GC callbacks and registration functions.

nodes.name: scriptdictionary.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptDictionary and CScriptDictValue including object type caching via SDictionaryCache, initialization-list construction, GC enumeration, iterator, and both native and generic AngelScript registration.

nodes.name: scriptfile.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptFile, a reference-counted FILE* wrapper for AngelScript. Supports open/close, binary/text read (int, uint, float, double, string, line), write, and cursor positioning. Includes registration functions.

nodes.name: scriptfile.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptFile with endianness-aware binary read/write methods, generic calling convention wrappers, and both native and generic AngelScript registration.

nodes.name: scriptfilesystem.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptFileSystem, a reference-counted filesystem utility for AngelScript scripts. Provides directory traversal, file operations (copy, move, delete, size), and path management. Depends on CScriptArray for directory/file listings.

nodes.name: scriptfilesystem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptFileSystem using platform-specific APIs (FindFirstFile/FindNextFile on Windows, opendir/readdir on POSIX) and AngelScript registration of all filesystem methods.

nodes.name: scriptgrid.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptGrid, a two-dimensional reference-counted generic container for AngelScript. Supports width/height resizing, element access, GC callbacks, and registration.

nodes.name: scriptgrid.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptGrid including buffer management for 2D element storage, construct/destruct helpers, GC enumeration, and AngelScript registration with factory functions.

nodes.name: scripthandle.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptHandle, a type-safe handle wrapper for AngelScript reference types. Supports dynamic cast, equality comparison, GC callbacks, and registration.

nodes.name: scripthandle.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CScriptHandle including reference management, dynamic cast via RefCastObject, GC enumeration/release, and AngelScript registration.

nodes.name: scripthelper.h
nodes.summary: Declares utility functions for AngelScript: CompareRelation, CompareEquality, ExecuteString (with optional return value), WriteConfigToFile/Stream, ConfigEngineFromStream, GetExceptionInfo, and RegisterExceptionRoutines.

nodes.name: scripthelper.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements AngelScript helper utilities including object comparison via opCmp/opEquals, inline script execution via temporary function compilation, engine configuration serialization/deserialization, and exception info formatting.

nodes.name: CContextMgr
nodes.summary: Manages a pool of AngelScript script contexts. Supports co-routines via SContextInfo groups, sleep/wake scheduling based on time callbacks, garbage collection tracking, and per-iteration ExecuteScripts loop.

nodes.name: CDateTime
nodes.summary: AngelScript-registered date/time value type backed by std::chrono::system_clock::time_point. Provides year/month/day/hour/minute/second accessors, date/time setters, and arithmetic operators for second-level differences.

nodes.name: CDebugger
nodes.summary: Interactive script debugger for AngelScript. Implements line callbacks, file/function breakpoints, step-into/over/out modes, local/global variable listing, member inspection, callstack printing, and pluggable type-to-string callbacks.

nodes.name: CScriptAny
nodes.summary: Reference-counted type-erased value container for AngelScript. Stores integers, doubles, or object references with type ID. Participates in GC cycle detection.

nodes.name: CScriptArray
nodes.summary: Generic reference-counted dynamic array for AngelScript. Supports template instantiation for any script type, sorting with native or script-function comparators, find, insert/remove, GC integration, and configurable memory allocators.

nodes.name: CScriptBuilder
nodes.summary: Script preprocessor and module builder. Handles #include deduplication, #pragma callbacks, DefineWord conditional compilation, and metadata extraction for classes/functions/variables declared in AngelScript sections.

nodes.name: CScriptDictionary
nodes.summary: Reference-counted key-value dictionary for AngelScript. Keys are std::string; values are CScriptDictValue. Uses unordered_map (C++11). Provides STL-style iterator, GC callbacks, and factory creation.

nodes.name: CScriptDictValue
nodes.summary: Polymorphic value container used internally by CScriptDictionary. Stores integer, float, or object references by type ID. Requires engine pointer for lifetime operations.

nodes.name: CScriptFile
nodes.summary: Reference-counted FILE pointer wrapper for AngelScript. Supports text and binary I/O with endianness control, read/write of primitive types and strings, and cursor positioning.

nodes.name: CScriptFileSystem
nodes.summary: Reference-counted filesystem utility for AngelScript. Provides directory navigation, file enumeration (returning CScriptArray), and file operations (copy, move, delete, mkdir, rmdir).

nodes.name: CScriptGrid
nodes.summary: Generic reference-counted 2D array for AngelScript. Supports arbitrary element types via type info, resizable width/height, element access by (x,y), GC integration, and configurable memory allocators.

nodes.name: CScriptHandle
nodes.summary: Type-safe script handle wrapper for AngelScript. Holds a reference and type info, supports dynamic cast, equality comparison, GC enumeration/release, and assignment from typed references.

nodes.name: asIScriptEngine
nodes.summary: Abstract AngelScript engine interface. Provides methods for registering types/functions/properties, module management, GC, context pooling, type introspection, JIT integration, and user data management.

nodes.name: asIScriptModule
nodes.summary: Abstract interface for an AngelScript script module. Manages compilation, functions, global variables, type info, enums, typedefs, imported functions, and bytecode serialization.

nodes.name: asIScriptContext
nodes.summary: Abstract AngelScript execution context. Controls script execution lifecycle (prepare/execute/abort/suspend), argument/return value passing, exception handling, and debugging callbacks.

nodes.name: asIScriptGeneric
nodes.summary: Abstract interface for generic calling convention wrappers in AngelScript. Provides access to engine, function, object, arguments, and return value slots.

nodes.name: asIScriptObject
nodes.summary: Abstract interface for AngelScript script objects at runtime. Exposes type info, property enumeration, engine access, copy, and user data.

nodes.name: asITypeInfo
nodes.summary: Abstract type information interface in AngelScript. Provides full introspection: name, flags, size, sub-types, interfaces, factories, methods, properties, behaviours, enums, typedef, and funcdef access.

nodes.name: asIScriptFunction
nodes.summary: Abstract AngelScript function interface. Exposes signature introspection (name, params, return type), function type, module/section info, delegate info, bytecode access, and user data.

nodes.name: asIBinaryStream
nodes.summary: Abstract binary stream interface for AngelScript bytecode serialization. Provides Read and Write operations.

nodes.name: asIStringFactory
nodes.summary: Abstract factory interface for AngelScript string constants. Provides GetStringConstant, ReleaseStringConstant, and GetRawStringData.

nodes.name: asIJITCompiler
nodes.summary: Abstract JIT compiler interface for AngelScript. Provides CompileFunction to produce asJITFunction output and ReleaseJITFunction for cleanup.

nodes.name: asILockableSharedBool
nodes.summary: Abstract thread-safe shared boolean interface used for weak reference flags in AngelScript. Provides Get/Set with Lock/Unlock.

nodes.name: asERetCodes
nodes.summary: AngelScript return code enumeration. Defines success (0) and error codes for all engine API operations.

nodes.name: asEEngineProp
nodes.summary: AngelScript engine property identifiers used with SetEngineProperty/GetEngineProperty for tuning bytecode optimization, stack sizes, string encoding, GC behavior, etc.

nodes.name: asEContextState
nodes.summary: AngelScript execution context state enumeration: FINISHED, SUSPENDED, ABORTED, EXCEPTION, PREPARED, UNINITIALIZED, ACTIVE, ERROR.

nodes.name: asEBehaviours
nodes.summary: AngelScript object behaviour identifiers for constructors, destructors, factories, reference counting, GC callbacks, and template validation.

nodes.name: asEObjTypeFlags
nodes.summary: AngelScript object type flags controlling reference/value semantics, GC participation, template instantiation, scripted vs application class traits, and alignment.

nodes.name: asEBCInstr
nodes.summary: AngelScript bytecode instruction set enumeration, defining all VM opcodes (e.g. asBC_CALL, asBC_RET, asBC_JMP).

nodes.name: DebugAction
nodes.summary: CDebugger internal enum defining stepping behavior: CONTINUE, STEP_INTO, STEP_OVER, STEP_OUT.

nodes.name: METADATATYPE
nodes.summary: CScriptBuilder internal enum classifying metadata declaration targets: MDT_TYPE, MDT_FUNC, MDT_VAR, MDT_VIRTPROP, MDT_FUNC_OR_VAR.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptDateTime
nodes.summary: Registers the CDateTime value type and all its methods and operators with an AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptAny
nodes.summary: Registers the CScriptAny reference type with an AngelScript engine using native or generic calling conventions automatically.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptArray
nodes.summary: Registers the CScriptArray template type with an AngelScript engine. The defaultArray flag controls whether it becomes the default array type.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptDictionary
nodes.summary: Registers CScriptDictionary and CScriptDictValue with an AngelScript engine, auto-selecting native or generic calling conventions.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptFile
nodes.summary: Registers the CScriptFile reference type with an AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptFileSystem
nodes.summary: Registers the CScriptFileSystem reference type with an AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptGrid
nodes.summary: Registers the CScriptGrid template type with an AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: RegisterScriptHandle
nodes.summary: Registers the CScriptHandle value type with an AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: RegisterExceptionRoutines
nodes.summary: Registers 'void throw(const string &msg)' and 'string getExceptionInfo()' global functions with an AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: ExecuteString
nodes.summary: Compiles and executes a code snippet string in an AngelScript engine context, with optional module scope and return value capture.

nodes.name: GetExceptionInfo
nodes.summary: Formats the current AngelScript script exception details (message, file, line, optional callstack) into a human-readable string.

nodes.name: WriteConfigToFile
nodes.summary: Serializes the registered AngelScript engine application interface to a file, compatible with the offline asbuild compiler.

nodes.name: ConfigEngineFromStream
nodes.summary: Loads and applies engine configuration from a stream (without actual function pointers), enabling bytecode compilation without a live engine registration.

nodes.name: scriptmath.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring AngelScript math registration functions: RegisterScriptMath, RegisterScriptMath_Native, RegisterScriptMath_Generic. Provides math library bindings for AngelScript scripts.

nodes.name: scriptmath.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements AngelScript math addon: registers float/double math functions (sin, cos, sqrt, pow, etc.) with the script engine, including IEEE 754 helpers and fraction utility. Supports both native and generic calling conventions.

nodes.name: scriptmathcomplex.h
nodes.summary: Header defining the Complex struct (float r, float i) with full arithmetic operators, swizzle accessors, and RegisterScriptMathComplex registration function.

nodes.name: Complex
nodes.summary: Value-type complex number struct with float real (r) and imaginary (i) components. Supports full arithmetic, assignment, comparison, length/squaredLength, and swizzle get_ri/get_ir accessors for AngelScript registration.

nodes.name: scriptmathcomplex.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the Complex struct methods and registers the complex number type with AngelScript engine via both native and generic calling conventions.

nodes.name: scriptstdstring.h
nodes.summary: Header for AngelScript std::string addon. Declares RegisterStdString and RegisterStdStringUtils. Configurable via AS_USE_STLNAMES and AS_USE_ACCESSORS macros.

nodes.name: scriptstdstring.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the AngelScript std::string addon (1347 lines). Includes CStdStringFactory (string constant cache using map/unordered_map), and registers std::string as a value type with all operators, conversions, and methods.

nodes.name: CStdStringFactory
nodes.summary: Implements asIStringFactory. Manages a reference-counted cache of string constants. Provides GetStringConstant, ReleaseStringConstant, and GetRawStringData.

nodes.name: scriptstdstring_utils.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements RegisterStdStringUtils: string utility functions for AngelScript such as split (returns CScriptArray) and join, bridging std::string with CScriptArray addon.

nodes.name: serializer.h
nodes.summary: Header for AngelScript script state serializer. Declares CUserType (abstract interface), CSerializedValue (tree node for variable state), and CSerializer (store/restore globals across reloads).

nodes.name: CUserType
nodes.summary: Abstract base struct for user-defined type serialization with virtual Store and Restore methods.

nodes.name: CSerializedValue
nodes.summary: Tree node representing a serialized AngelScript variable/object. Stores type info, name, namespace, pointers, primitive data buffer, and children. Handles recursive store/restore and handle replacement.

nodes.name: CSerializer
nodes.summary: Top-level serializer for AngelScript modules. Stores all global variables via Store(), restores them via Restore() after script reload. Supports extra objects and user-registered type handlers.

nodes.name: serializer.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CSerializer and CSerializedValue: iterates module globals, recursively serializes objects/handles to memory, and restores after rebuild. Handles deduplication and pointer remapping.

nodes.name: as_array.h
nodes.summary: Header-only template dynamic array asCArray<T> used internally by AngelScript. Stack-allocated buffer for small sizes, full dynamic grow, search, remove, concatenate operations.

nodes.name: asCArray
nodes.summary: Internal AngelScript template dynamic array with inline small-buffer optimization. Used pervasively across the engine for storing instructions, variables, functions, etc.

nodes.name: as_atomic.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring asCAtomic for thread-safe atomic DWORD operations (get/set/atomicInc/atomicDec) used for reference counting.

nodes.name: asCAtomic
nodes.summary: Thread-safe atomic DWORD wrapper. Uses platform-specific primitives (Win32 Interlocked* or GCC __sync_*) for reference counting.

nodes.name: as_atomic.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCAtomic: constructor and platform-specific atomic increment/decrement with assertion guarding against corruption.

nodes.name: as_builder.h
nodes.summary: Header for asCBuilder, the AngelScript script compilation manager. Declares intermediate compilation structs (sFunctionDescription, sGlobalVariableDescription, sClassDeclaration, sMixinClass, sFuncDef) and full asCBuilder class interface.

nodes.name: asCBuilder
nodes.summary: Central script compilation manager. Parses and registers types/functions/variables, compiles classes/interfaces/global vars, resolves namespaces and template instances. Friends with asCModule, asCParser, asCCompiler, asCScriptEngine.

nodes.name: as_builder.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCBuilder (6214 lines): full script compilation pipeline including parsing, type/function/variable registration, class/interface/enum compilation, template resolution, and error reporting.

nodes.name: as_bytecode.h
nodes.summary: Header for asCByteCode and asCByteInstruction. asCByteCode builds a linked-list bytecode stream with typed instruction emission, optimization, line number extraction, and finalization.

nodes.name: asCByteCode
nodes.summary: AngelScript bytecode builder using a doubly-linked list of instructions. Provides typed emission (InstrDWORD, InstrQWORD, etc.), peephole optimization, jump resolution, and variable/line info extraction.

nodes.name: asCByteInstruction
nodes.summary: Single doubly-linked bytecode instruction node storing opcode, 64-bit arg, three 16-bit word args, stack delta, and optimization marking state.

nodes.name: as_bytecode.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCByteCode: peephole optimization, dead code elimination, jump resolution, variable liveness analysis, line number extraction, and debug disassembly output.

nodes.name: as_callfunc.h
nodes.summary: Header for native function call dispatch. Declares DetectCallingConvention, PrepareSystemFunction, CallSystemFunction, the internalCallConv enum, and asSSystemFunctionInterface descriptor.

nodes.name: asSSystemFunctionInterface
nodes.summary: Descriptor for a registered C++ system function. Stores function pointer, calling convention, return/parameter sizes, auto-handle flags, composite offset, auxiliary functor pointer, and argument cleanup list.

nodes.name: as_callfunc.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DetectCallingConvention and PrepareSystemFunction. Maps AngelScript calling convention tokens to internal internalCallConv enum values and sets up asSSystemFunctionInterface.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_arm.cpp
nodes.summary: ARM platform implementation of system function calling (AAPCS). Guarded by AS_ARM preprocessor define.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_mips.cpp
nodes.summary: MIPS O32 platform implementation of system function calling. Guarded by AS_MIPS preprocessor define.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_ppc.cpp
nodes.summary: PowerPC 32-bit platform implementation of system function calling. Guarded by AS_PPC preprocessor define.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_ppc_64.cpp
nodes.summary: PowerPC 64-bit platform implementation of system function calling. Guarded by AS_PPC_64 preprocessor define.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_sh4.cpp
nodes.summary: SuperH SH4 platform implementation of system function calling. Guarded by AS_SH4 preprocessor define.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_x64_gcc.cpp
nodes.summary: AMD64 System V ABI implementation for GCC/Linux 64-bit. Handles integer/float register argument classification. Guarded by AS_X64_GCC.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_x64_mingw.cpp
nodes.summary: x64 Windows calling convention implementation for MinGW (Microsoft x64 ABI). Guarded by AS_X64_MINGW preprocessor define.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_x64_msvc.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements native function call dispatch for the x64 MSVC ABI, marshalling script arguments into registers and calling arbitrary C++ functions using an external ASM helper (CallX64).
nodes.languageNotes: Guards the entire implementation with AS_X64_MSVC and AS_MAX_PORTABILITY macros; relies on hand-written x64 MSVC assembly for the actual call.

nodes.name: CallSystemFunctionNative
nodes.summary: Marshals script-side arguments into the x64 MSVC calling convention (integer and XMM float buffers) then delegates to the external CallX64 assembly routine, returning the result QWORD.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_x86.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements native function call dispatch for x86 platforms, supporting cdecl, stdcall, and thiscall conventions by pushing script arguments onto the stack and delegating to convention-specific assembly helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines CLEAR_FPU_STACK macro to reset FPU state between calls; guards body with AS_X86 preprocessor guard.

nodes.name: CallSystemFunctionNative
nodes.summary: Selects the appropriate x86 call helper (cdecl, stdcall, thiscall, etc.) based on the function interface descriptor and dispatches the native call, handling object pointers and return-in-memory conventions.

nodes.name: as_callfunc_xenon.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements native function call dispatch for the Xbox 360 (Xenon/PowerPC) ABI, distributing arguments across integer (r3-r10) and float (fr1-fr13) registers via inline assembly.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains extensive inline PPC assembly (ppcFunc) and detailed documentation of the Xbox 360 calling convention within the source comments.

nodes.name: as_compiler.cpp
nodes.summary: Core AngelScript compiler implementation — translates parsed AST nodes into bytecode, resolving symbols, types, overloads, implicit conversions, and control flow for script functions, constructors, factories, and global variables.
nodes.languageNotes: Largest file in the engine (~16 000 lines); implements the full expression/statement compiler including overload resolution, template instantiation, lambda support, and constant folding.

nodes.name: as_compiler.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCCompiler and its supporting value/context structs (asCExprValue, asCExprContext, asSDeferredParam) that together represent the compiler's internal expression state and bytecode builder.

nodes.name: asCExprValue
nodes.summary: Represents the type and constant value of a compiled expression, providing typed accessors for all scalar types (byte, word, dword, qword, float, double) and flags for lvalue, temporary, and constant status.

nodes.name: asCExprContext
nodes.summary: Holds the full compilation context for an expression: its generated bytecode, value type, property accessor state, deferred parameters, and source node back-reference.

nodes.name: asCCompiler
nodes.summary: Primary AngelScript script compiler class with public entry points for compiling functions, constructors, factories, and global variables, plus extensive protected helpers for statement, expression, implicit conversion, and symbol resolution.

nodes.name: as_config.h
nodes.summary: Master configuration header for the AngelScript library — detects platform, architecture, and compiler, defining size typedefs, calling-convention selectors, and feature flags used throughout the engine.
nodes.languageNotes: 1262 lines of nested preprocessor guards covering x86/x64/ARM/PPC, MSVC/GCC/Clang, Windows/Linux/macOS/console platforms; this header is the single dependency hub included by every other translation unit.

nodes.name: as_configgroup.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCConfigGroup — manages lifetime, reference counting, and cleanup of engine configuration groups (registered types, functions, and global properties) allowing them to be added and removed atomically.

nodes.name: as_configgroup.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCConfigGroup, which groups engine-registered types, script functions, and global properties so they can be added and removed as a single atomic unit.

nodes.name: asCConfigGroup
nodes.summary: Groups registered types, functions, and global properties to enable atomic registration and removal from the script engine, supporting reference-counted lifecycle management.

nodes.name: as_context.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCContext — the AngelScript bytecode execution engine, including instruction dispatch, stack management, exception handling, debugging callbacks, and native/generic function call bridges.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains the main bytecode interpreter switch statement; ~5978 lines covering the entire script VM execution loop.

nodes.name: as_context.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCContext implementing asIScriptContext — the execution context managing the call stack, registers, exception state, and debugging callbacks for running AngelScript bytecode.

nodes.name: asCContext
nodes.summary: Concrete implementation of the AngelScript execution context, managing bytecode execution, the dynamic call stack, exception propagation, line/exception callbacks, and JIT register state.

nodes.name: as_criticalsection.h
nodes.summary: Provides platform-abstracted critical section and reader-writer lock primitives (POSIX pthreads and Windows CRITICAL_SECTION/SRWLOCK) used to protect shared engine state in multithreaded scenarios.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses preprocessor macros (DECLARECRITICALSECTION, ENTERCRITICALSECTION, etc.) so code that uses locks compiles to no-ops when AS_NO_THREADS is defined.

nodes.name: asCThreadCriticalSection
nodes.summary: Cross-platform critical section wrapper providing Enter/Leave/TryEnter, implemented with pthreads on POSIX and CRITICAL_SECTION on Windows.

nodes.name: asCThreadReadWriteLock
nodes.summary: Cross-platform reader-writer lock implemented with pthread_rwlock on POSIX and a fair readers-writers lock using CRITICAL_SECTION + semaphore on Windows.

nodes.name: as_datatype.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCDataType — the compiler's representation of expression types, including construction helpers, handle/array/reference modifiers, size queries, and formatted type-name generation.

nodes.name: as_datatype.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCDataType, which encodes a script type along with reference, const, handle, and auto qualifiers for use throughout the AngelScript compiler and runtime.

nodes.name: asCDataType
nodes.summary: Encapsulates a compiled script data type including its base token type, associated type info, reference/const/handle/auto qualifiers, and provides size and compatibility queries.

nodes.name: as_debug.h
nodes.summary: Conditional debug/profiling header that defines CProfiler and CProfilerScope classes (MSVC only, AS_PROFILE) to measure execution time of named code sections, writing summaries to AS_DEBUG/profiling_summary.txt.

nodes.name: CProfiler
nodes.summary: High-resolution function profiler using QueryPerformanceCounter that tracks total time, call count, min, and max for named scopes, writing a summary report on destruction.

nodes.name: as_gc.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the AngelScript incremental mark-and-sweep garbage collector, detecting and breaking cyclic references among script objects across multiple interruptible phases.

nodes.name: as_gc.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCGarbageCollector — an incremental GC managing tracked objects in new/old lists with state machines for destruction and cyclic-reference detection phases.

nodes.name: asCGarbageCollector
nodes.summary: Incremental garbage collector for AngelScript that uses two state machines (destroy and detect) to progressively identify and break cyclic object references while keeping pauses short.

nodes.name: as_generic.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCGeneric — the adapter class that exposes typed argument getters and return setters for functions registered with the asCALL_GENERIC calling convention.

nodes.name: as_generic.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCGeneric implementing asIScriptGeneric — the portable generic calling convention interface providing typed argument access and return value setting for registered C++ functions.

nodes.name: asCGeneric
nodes.summary: Concrete generic call adapter holding engine, function descriptor, current object, and stack pointer references, providing typed GetArg/SetReturn accessors that index into the raw script stack.

nodes.name: as_globalproperty.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCGlobalProperty — manages storage allocation, reference counting, and initialization function for a single script-declared or registered global variable.

nodes.name: as_map.h
nodes.summary: Header-only red-black tree map template (asCMap<KEY,VAL>) providing O(log n) insert, erase, and bidirectional cursor traversal; the primary associative container used internally across the AngelScript engine.
nodes.languageNotes: Self-contained red-black tree with no external dependencies; no imports (empty batchImportData entry).

nodes.name: asCMap
nodes.summary: Red-black balanced binary search tree template offering Insert, Erase, EraseAll, MoveTo, MoveFirst, MoveLast, MoveNext, and MovePrev cursor operations with O(log n) complexity.

nodes.name: as_memory.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCMemoryMgr and the global userAlloc/userFree hooks that redirect AngelScript's internal allocations to application-supplied memory routines, including pooled script-node and byte-instruction allocators.

nodes.name: as_memory.h
nodes.summary: Declares the global memory management hooks (userAlloc/userFree), asNEW/asDELETE macros, and asCMemoryMgr pooling class that centralise all dynamic allocation within the AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: asCMemoryMgr
nodes.summary: Thread-safe pool allocator for asCScriptNode and byte-instruction objects, reducing allocation overhead by recycling freed instances.

nodes.name: as_module.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCModule — a named script compilation unit exposing build, function lookup, global variable access, bytecode save/load, and dynamic import binding through the asIScriptModule interface.

nodes.name: as_module.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCModule implementing asIScriptModule — the container for a compiled script with function/global-variable/type registries, import binding tables, and bytecode serialization.

nodes.name: asCModule
nodes.summary: Concrete script module holding compiled script functions, global variables, class/enum/typedef/funcdef type registries, import binding info, and the builder reference for incremental compilation.

nodes.name: as_namespace.h
nodes.summary: Defines the asSNameSpace and asSNameSpaceNamePair POD structs used to represent and look up named namespaces throughout the AngelScript type system.

nodes.name: as_objecttype.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCObjectType, the runtime descriptor for script-declared and registered object types, providing methods for querying properties, methods, factories, behaviours, and managing reference-counted teardown.

nodes.name: as_objecttype.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCObjectType (the internal object-type descriptor) and asSTypeBehaviour (a struct holding all registered behaviour function IDs such as constructors, destructors, GC hooks, and factory entries).
nodes.languageNotes: Uses BEGIN_AS_NAMESPACE/END_AS_NAMESPACE macros to wrap the AngelScript library namespace.

nodes.name: as_parser.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCParser, the recursive-descent parser that transforms AngelScript source tokens into an abstract syntax tree (AST) of asCScriptNode objects, covering declarations, statements, and expressions.

nodes.name: as_parser.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCParser, the recursive-descent AngelScript parser class with public entry points for scripts, function definitions, data types, and internal helper methods for every grammar production.
nodes.languageNotes: The compiler-only methods are conditionally compiled with #ifndef AS_NO_COMPILER guards.

nodes.name: as_property.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCObjectProperty (per-instance member metadata), asCGlobalProperty (engine-registered global variable with ref-counting and optional init function), and asCCompGlobPropType (a filter predicate for symbol-table lookup by type).

nodes.name: as_restore.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCReader and asCWriter for binary serialization and deserialization of compiled AngelScript bytecode modules, including function signatures, type declarations, byte code, and used-resource tables.

nodes.name: as_restore.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCReader and asCWriter for saving and loading pre-compiled AngelScript bytecode modules to/from binary streams, with helpers for stack offset adjustment and list-pattern buffer management.

nodes.name: as_scriptcode.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCScriptCode, which stores raw script source text and provides utilities for copying code, converting byte positions to row/column, and token equality checks.

nodes.name: as_scriptcode.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCScriptCode, a container for raw AngelScript source text passed to the builder/parser, with line-position tracking for error reporting.

nodes.name: as_scriptengine.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCScriptEngine, the central AngelScript runtime managing type registration, script compilation, function/module lifecycle, garbage collection, context pooling, and template instantiation.

nodes.name: as_scriptengine.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCScriptEngine, the primary engine class implementing asIScriptEngine, with the full public API surface and internal data structures for type registration, module management, garbage collection, and configuration.

nodes.name: as_scriptfunction.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCScriptFunction, containing construction, destruction, declaration string formatting, signature comparison, JIT compilation dispatch, reference tracking, and bytecode introspection for all AngelScript function types.

nodes.name: as_scriptfunction.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCScriptFunction and related structs (asSScriptVariable, asSListPatternNode, asSFunctionTraits) representing compiled/registered AngelScript functions with full signature, bytecode, debug info, and JIT support fields.

nodes.name: as_scriptnode.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCScriptNode, the AST node used during AngelScript parsing, providing construction, recursive destruction (via engine memory manager), deep-copy, and parent-disconnect helpers.

nodes.name: as_scriptnode.h
nodes.summary: Declares eScriptNode (the full enumeration of AST node types), sToken, and asCScriptNode (the linked-list AST node with parent/child/sibling pointers) used throughout the AngelScript parser and compiler.

nodes.name: as_scriptobject.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCScriptObject and asCLockableSharedBool, providing the runtime object model for script-declared classes: ref counting, GC integration, property access, deep copy, destructor dispatch, and factory/registration helpers.

nodes.name: as_scriptobject.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCScriptObject (the generic runtime instance for script classes implementing asIScriptObject) and asCLockableSharedBool (a thread-safe ref-counted weak-reference flag).

nodes.name: as_string.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCString, a fixed-small-buffer C++ string class optimised for AngelScript's internal use, with concatenation, assignment, format, substring, and comparison operations.

nodes.name: as_string.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCString (a value-semantic string with a 12-byte inline buffer SSO optimisation) and asCStringPointer (a thin wrapper for pointer-keyed use in asCMap), with all comparison and concatenation operators.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a union of dynamic pointer and 12-byte local buffer for SSO (small string optimisation).

nodes.name: as_string_util.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements AngelScript string utility functions: UTF-8/UTF-16 encoding/decoding, double and uint64 parsing from strings, and lexicographic string comparison.

nodes.name: as_string_util.h
nodes.summary: Declares AngelScript string utility free functions for UTF-8/UTF-16 encode/decode, numeric scanning from character buffers, and string comparison.

nodes.name: as_symboltable.h
nodes.summary: Implements asCSymbolTable<T>, a template symbol table mapping (namespace, name) pairs to typed entries stored in a stable index array, used for fast symbol lookup throughout the AngelScript compiler and runtime.
nodes.languageNotes: Header-only template implementation using asCMap for the keyed index and asCArray for stable index storage; also declares the asCSymbolTableIterator template.

nodes.name: as_texts.h
nodes.summary: Central repository of all AngelScript compiler and runtime error/warning message string constants, defined as preprocessor macros for consistency and potential localisation.

nodes.name: as_thread.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCThreadManager and asCThreadLocalData, providing cross-platform thread-local storage (TLS) management so each thread gets its own AngelScript context list and string scratch buffer.

nodes.name: as_thread.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCThreadManager (TLS lifecycle management, Prepare/Unprepare, application-level read-write lock) and asCThreadLocalData (per-thread active context list and scratch string).

nodes.name: asCObjectType
nodes.summary: Internal AngelScript object-type descriptor extending asCTypeInfo; stores properties, methods, interface list, VFT, derived-from chain, behaviour IDs, and template sub-type info.

nodes.name: asSTypeBehaviour
nodes.summary: Plain struct holding integer IDs for all registered behaviours of an object type (factory, construct, destruct, copy, addref, release, GC hooks, weakref flag).

nodes.name: asCParser
nodes.summary: Recursive-descent parser for AngelScript source code; exposes top-level parse entry points and contains private production methods for all grammar constructs (declarations, statements, expressions).

nodes.name: asCObjectProperty
nodes.summary: Stores metadata for a single member property of a script object type, including name, data type, byte offset, access mask, and visibility flags.

nodes.name: asCGlobalProperty
nodes.summary: Reference-counted descriptor for a global property registered with the AngelScript engine, holding storage (either a registered external address or internal memory) and an optional initialisation function.

nodes.name: asCReader
nodes.summary: Deserialises a pre-compiled AngelScript module from a binary stream, reconstructing functions, type declarations, global properties, byte code, and translating all stored IDs and pointers.

nodes.name: asCWriter
nodes.summary: Serialises a compiled AngelScript module to a binary stream, writing function signatures, byte code, type declarations, and used-resource tables with stack-position adjustment.

nodes.name: asCScriptCode
nodes.summary: Container for AngelScript source text passed to the builder; manages optional ownership of the code buffer and provides line/column position mapping for diagnostics.

nodes.name: asCScriptEngine
nodes.summary: The central AngelScript engine class implementing asIScriptEngine; manages type registration, module lifecycle, script function repository, GC, config groups, namespaces, context pooling, and JIT integration.

nodes.name: asCScriptFunction
nodes.summary: Internal AngelScript function descriptor implementing asIScriptFunction; holds signature (name, return type, params, traits), bytecode, JIT function pointer, debug variable info, and reference counting for all function types (script, system, virtual, delegate, stub).

nodes.name: asCScriptNode
nodes.summary: Doubly-linked AST node used by the AngelScript parser, carrying node type, token type/position, and parent/child/sibling pointers; recycled through the engine memory manager.

nodes.name: asCScriptObject
nodes.summary: Generic runtime instance for script-declared classes implementing asIScriptObject; provides reference counting, GC flag management, property access, deep copy, and destructor dispatch.

nodes.name: asCLockableSharedBool
nodes.summary: Thread-safe ref-counted boolean used as the weak-reference flag for script objects, implementing asILockableSharedBool with lock/unlock semantics.

nodes.name: asCString
nodes.summary: AngelScript's internal string class with SSO (12-byte inline buffer), providing allocation, concatenation, assignment, format, substring, find, and comparison operations.

nodes.name: asCSymbolTable
nodes.summary: Template symbol table mapping (namespace, name) keys to typed pointers stored at stable indices; used by the AngelScript engine and compiler for fast multi-name lookups with optional filter predicates.

nodes.name: asCThreadManager
nodes.summary: Singleton thread manager for AngelScript providing TLS allocation (GetLocalData/CleanupLocalData), engine-level Prepare/Unprepare, and an application-visible read-write lock.

nodes.name: DestroyInternal
nodes.summary: Releases all resources owned by the object type (template sub-types, child funcdefs, base class reference, properties, functions, type-id map entry) and clears the engine pointer to mark the type as invalid.

nodes.name: AddPropertyToClass
nodes.summary: Appends a new property to a script class type, computing its aligned byte offset, adjusting object size, registering config-group references, and returning the new property descriptor.

nodes.name: ReleaseAllFunctions
nodes.summary: Releases internal references for all script functions associated with the object type, including factories, constructors, behaviour callbacks, method table, and VFT entries.

nodes.name: as_tokendef.h
nodes.summary: Defines the complete token vocabulary for the AngelScript language: the eTokenType enum, sTokenWord struct, and the full tokenWords lookup table mapping symbols and keywords to token types, plus context-sensitive keyword constants.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a macro asTokenDef to build a static array of sTokenWord entries; includes a conditional compile path for AS_USE_DOUBLE_AS_FLOAT.

nodes.name: as_tokenizer.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the asCTokenizer class that lexes raw script source into tokens; builds a jump table keyed by first character for O(1) keyword lookup and handles whitespace, comments, numeric/string constants, identifiers, and keywords.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a 256-entry pointer array (keywordTable) sorted by token length for greedy matching; handles UTF-8 BOM and double-byte character sets.

nodes.name: as_tokenizer.h
nodes.summary: Declares asCTokenizer, which tokenizes AngelScript source code; exposes GetToken() publicly and gates construction/destruction as friend of asCScriptEngine.

nodes.name: asCTokenizer
nodes.summary: Tokenizer class for AngelScript source; provides static GetDefinition and instance GetToken, with internal parsing helpers and a 256-slot keyword jump table.

nodes.name: as_typeinfo.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the asCTypeInfo class hierarchy (base type info, enum types, typedef types, funcdef types) including reference counting, user data management, and safe downcast helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses dual internal/external reference counting to separate script-engine-internal and application-level lifetime; downcast helpers use reinterpret_cast guarded by flags.

nodes.name: as_typeinfo.h
nodes.summary: Declares the asCTypeInfo class and its subclasses (asCEnumType, asCTypedefType, asCFuncdefType) forming the type-info hierarchy used throughout the AngelScript engine.

nodes.name: asCTypeInfo
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for all AngelScript type descriptors; implements asITypeInfo interface with dual-refcount memory management, name/namespace/flags/size fields, and user data storage.

nodes.name: asCEnumType
nodes.summary: Represents an AngelScript enum type; stores an array of asSEnumValue entries and implements GetEnumValueCount/GetEnumValueByIndex.

nodes.name: asCTypedefType
nodes.summary: Represents an AngelScript typedef (type alias); holds the aliased asCDataType and implements GetTypedefTypeId.

nodes.name: asCFuncdefType
nodes.summary: Represents an AngelScript funcdef (function pointer type); links to the asCScriptFunction it describes and optionally to a parent class for delegate patterns.

nodes.name: as_variablescope.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements asCVariableScope for tracking variable declarations within a compiler scope block, supporting nested parent lookup and stack offset-based lookup.

nodes.name: as_variablescope.h
nodes.summary: Declares sVariable struct and asCVariableScope class used by the AngelScript compiler to manage variable declarations within lexical scopes.

nodes.name: asCVariableScope
nodes.summary: Manages the set of variables declared within a single lexical scope during AngelScript compilation; supports parent-scope chaining for nested lookup.

nodes.name: weakref.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the CScriptWeakRef class and its AngelScript registration functions (both native and generic calling conventions) providing weak reference semantics for script reference types.
nodes.languageNotes: Provides both native (asCALL_CDECL_OBJLAST) and generic (asCALL_GENERIC) registration paths selected via AS_MAX_PORTABILITY compile option.
