nodes.name: weakref.h
nodes.summary: Declares CScriptWeakRef class providing weak reference support for AngelScript reference types, exposing Get, Set, Equals, and comparison operators.

nodes.name: CScriptWeakRef
nodes.summary: Weak reference wrapper for AngelScript script objects; holds a pointer to asILockableSharedBool that signals object destruction and provides thread-safe Get().

nodes.name: CMakeLists.txt
nodes.summary: CMake build configuration for the Main executable; collects all source files recursively, extracts the AngelScript version from its header, enables MASM for x64 MSVC, and links against Algorithm and DirectX12 libraries.
nodes.languageNotes: Extracts AngelScript version with a REGEX MATCH on the header file; conditionally adds .asm source for MSVC x64 targets.

nodes.name: Feature.cpp
nodes.summary: Minimal translation unit that includes Feature.h; serves as a placeholder for C++ feature exploration experiments.

nodes.name: Feature.h
nodes.summary: Declares an empty my_namespace; placeholder header for C++ language feature experiments in the engine learning project.

nodes.name: Test.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements MainTest::MainTestFunc and MainTest::VirtualMainTestFunc; both print to console via printf, used by Transfer module to demonstrate virtual dispatch.

nodes.name: Test.h
nodes.summary: Declares MainTest class with a regular method and a virtual method; imported by the Transfer module to exercise cross-DLL virtual function dispatch.

nodes.name: MainTest
nodes.summary: Simple test class with one non-virtual and one virtual method; used across module boundaries to validate virtual dispatch and pointer semantics.

nodes.name: main.cpp
nodes.summary: Windows application entry point (WinMain) that initializes a console, opens a DirectX 12 render window via InitDirect3DApp, and demonstrates a thread runnable pattern; also defines HWND creation helpers and a TestThread exercising the FRunnable interface.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Windows SUBSYSTEM:WINDOWS; allocates a console at runtime via AllocConsole for log output, and loads Transfer.dll capabilities through the engine.

nodes.name: CMakeLists.txt
nodes.summary: CMake build configuration for the Transfer shared library; collects sources from Transfer/src/, defines TRANSFER_LIBRARY for DLL export macros, and builds a SHARED library target.

nodes.name: ChildObject.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ChildObject::Transfer template and redirectTransfer; redirectTransfer delegates to TransferBase::TransferDispatch, forwarding this object through the trait-based dispatch chain.

nodes.name: ChildObject.h
nodes.summary: Declares ChildObject extending BaseObject with a templated Transfer method and virtual redirectTransfer, participating in the Transfer dispatch system.

nodes.name: ChildObject
nodes.summary: DLL-exported child class that extends BaseObject and overrides redirectTransfer to route dispatch through TransferBase::TransferDispatch.

nodes.name: Module.h
nodes.summary: Defines the TRANSFERMODULE DLL export/import macro; expands to __declspec(dllexport) when building the Transfer library and __declspec(dllimport) when consuming it.

nodes.name: BaseObject.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements BaseObject::Transfer template (explicitly instantiated for TransferBase) and redirectTransfer; redirectTransfer calls self(), Transfer(), and TransferDispatch() in sequence to demonstrate the full dispatch chain.

nodes.name: BaseObject.h
nodes.summary: Declares the DLL-exported BaseObject class with a virtual redirectTransfer and a templated Transfer method; serves as the base for all objects participating in the Transfer dispatch system.

nodes.name: BaseObject
nodes.summary: Base object for the Transfer dispatch system; redirectTransfer routes through the full TransferBase chain and the templated Transfer method is overridden by subclasses.

nodes.name: ChildObject.cpp
nodes.summary: Minimal stub that includes Objects/ChildObject.h; effectively a placeholder translation unit for the Objects-subdirectory ChildObject.

nodes.name: ChildObject.h
nodes.summary: Declares an independent DLL-exported ChildObject (in the Objects subdirectory) with constructor that immediately invokes redirectTransfer, demonstrating in-constructor dispatch via TransferBase.

nodes.name: ChildObject
nodes.summary: DLL-exported Objects-layer ChildObject that calls redirectTransfer in its constructor with a stack-local TransferBase; demonstrates early-binding dispatch pattern.

nodes.name: TransferBase.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the standalone TestTransfer function that calls VirtualMainTestFunc on a MainTest pointer, demonstrating cross-module virtual dispatch; includes TransferBase.h for context.

nodes.name: TransferBase.h
nodes.summary: Defines the TransferBase class with the trait-based TransferDispatch template, the ChildTranser<T> subclass, the DerivedType trait, and declares the exported TestTransfer function and TestTransfer001 class.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses explicit template specialization (DerivedType<T>) and a virtual TransferDown to enable safe downcasting; ChildTranser<T> overrides self() to return the concrete derived type.

nodes.name: TransferBase
nodes.summary: Abstract base for the Transfer dispatch system; provides TransferDispatch<T> template that uses TraitsType for safe downcast and virtual TransferDown for override by concrete transfer implementations.

nodes.name: ChildTranser
nodes.summary: Template subclass of TransferBase that overrides self() to return the concrete T& type, enabling type-safe chaining of the dispatch chain.

nodes.name: TransferUtility.h
nodes.summary: Declares TraitsBase and TraitsType<T> template used for safe downcast within the Transfer dispatch system; TraitsType::DownCastRealType uses reinterpret_cast to convert BaseObject& to T&.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses reinterpret_cast for downcast rather than dynamic_cast for performance; safe only when the type system invariants are maintained by the dispatch chain.

layers.name: Build & Configuration
layers.description: CMake build scripts, Visual Studio settings, and DLL export/import macro headers that define the project build system.

layers.name: Platform Abstraction
layers.description: Cross-platform type definitions, platform process utilities, atomic types, numeric limits, and noncopyable base. The lowest-level foundation of the Core module.

layers.name: Common Utilities
layers.description: Shared utility code including the LogAssert dual-output logging and assertion system (console + file).

layers.name: Threading Primitives
layers.description: Windows threading infrastructure: runnable threads, events (Win32 synchronization), critical sections, RW locks, TLS, thread manager, and scope guards.

layers.name: Task Graph System
layers.description: UE4-style task graph implementation: FTaskGraphInterface, TGraphTask, FGraphEvent, named threads (game/render/RHI), worker threads, and task dispatch infrastructure.

layers.name: Algorithm Library
layers.description: Algorithm DLL exposing sorting implementations (select, insert, shell, merge sort) via ALGOMODULE export macros. Public API-only module.

layers.name: Transfer Dispatch
layers.description: Transfer DLL implementing traits-based type-safe dispatch via TransferBase, ChildTransfer<T>, TraitsType<T>, and BaseObject/ChildObject.

layers.name: DirectX12 Framework
layers.description: DirectX12 DLL containing D3DApp base class, BoxApp sample, game timer, math helpers, and mesh geometry utilities for GPU rendering.

layers.name: AngelScript Engine Core
layers.description: Embedded AngelScript scripting engine internals: compiler (asCCompiler), runtime context (asCContext), garbage collector (asCGarbageCollector), script engine (asCScriptEngine), bytecode, and all as_* source files.

layers.name: AngelScript Add-ons & API
layers.description: AngelScript public API header (angelscript.h) and official add-on types registered with the scripting engine: CScriptArray, CScriptDictionary, CScriptBuilder, CScriptFile, CScriptHandle, CContextMgr, CDebugger, CDateTime, CSerializer, and all public interfaces.

layers.name: Application / Entry Point
layers.description: Main executable entry point (WinMain in main.cpp), C++ feature exploration code (CPPFeature/), and test/challenge implementations (Test/).

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: Start at `Main/main.cpp` — the WinMain entry point. The engine allocates a Win32 console for logging, calls `InitLogFile("Engine.log")` to set up dual-output logging (console + file), then creates an `InitDirect3DApp` (a DirectX12 application) and runs its message loop. The `TestThread` class in the same file demonstrates threading: it implements both `FRunnable` (for real threads) and `FSingleThreadRunnable` (fallback tick interface), created via `FRunnableThread::Create()`.

tour.title: Platform Abstraction Layer
tour.description: The `Core/Base/` directory provides the platform foundation. `GenericPlatform.h` defines fundamental types (`uint8`, `int32`, `TCHAR`, etc.) and calling convention macros (`FORCEINLINE`, `CDECL`). `FGenericPlatformProcess` and `FWindowsPlatformProcess` implement Windows-specific thread creation, affinity, sleep, and synchronization event management. `BaseDefines.h` adds global thread IDs (`GGameThreadId`, `GRenderThreadId`) and the `verify()` assertion macro. All other modules build on these abstractions.

tour.title: Threading Primitives
tour.description: `Core/Threads/` implements the threading layer on top of the platform layer. `FRunnable` is the abstract task interface — override `Init()`, `Run()`, `Stop()`, `Exit()`. `FRunnableThread` wraps Win32 `CreateThread`. `FEvent`/`FEventWin` provide named wait-able events. `FWindowsCriticalSection` and `FWindowsRWLock` are RAII wrappers around `CRITICAL_SECTION` and `SRWLOCK`. `FScopeLock` / `FRWScopeLock` provide automatic lock/unlock. `FWindowsPlatformTLS` exposes thread-local storage via `TlsAlloc`/`TlsGetValue`.

tour.title: Task Graph System
tour.description: Built on top of threading, `Core/Task/` implements an Unreal Engine-style task graph. `FTaskGraphInterface` is the singleton interface. `TGraphTask<TTask>` wraps user-defined tasks with prerequisite tracking via `FGraphEvent`. Named threads (`ENamedThreads::GameThread`, `RenderThread`, `RHIThread`) and an arbitrary number of worker threads are managed by `FTaskGraphImplementation`. Task dispatch flow: `TGraphTask<T>::CreateTask(prerequisites)->DispatchSubsequents(thread)`. The `FBaseGraphTask` base handles reference counting and `QueueTask()` routing.

tour.title: DirectX12 Rendering Framework
tour.description: `DirectX12/` contains the GPU rendering layer. `D3DApp` (in `DirectX12/Common/D3DApp.h`) is the abstract base class for DirectX12 applications — it handles device/swapchain creation, fence management, command queue/list setup, and the `Run()`/`Draw()` message loop. `InitDirect3DApp` (in `DirectX12/Chapter/InitDirect3D.h`) is the concrete demo app that Main instantiates. `GameTimer` provides high-resolution timing, `MathHelper` provides common 3D math, and `MeshGeometry`/`SubMeshGeometry` define GPU buffer layouts.

tour.title: AngelScript Scripting Engine
tour.description: `Main/AngelScript/` embeds the complete AngelScript 2.33.0 scripting engine. The public API is in `include/angelscript.h` — all interaction goes through `asIScriptEngine`, `asIScriptContext`, and `asIScriptModule` abstract interfaces. The engine core (`source/as_*.cpp`) contains the compiler (`asCCompiler`), runtime (`asCContext`), garbage collector (`asCGarbageCollector`), and bytecode system. The add-ons layer (contextmgr, scriptarray, scriptbuilder, scriptdictionary, scriptfile, scriptgrid, scripthandle, scripthelper) extends the engine with C++-backed container types and utilities registered via `RegisterScript*()` functions.

tour.title: Algorithm & Transfer DLLs
tour.description: Two smaller DLLs complete the project. `Algorithm/` exports sorting algorithms (`SelectSort`, `InsertSort`, `ShellSort`, `MergeSortUpDown`) via `ALGOMODULE` (`__declspec(dllexport/dllimport)`). `Transfer/` implements a traits-based type-safe dispatch system: `TransferBase` provides the abstract interface, `ChildTransfer<T>` specializes for concrete types, and `TraitsType<T>` enables safe downcasting. Objects call `redirectTransfer(transfer)` which eventually calls `TransferDispatch()` using the trait type for a type-safe downcast — a pattern for safe, extensible visitor-style dispatch without `dynamic_cast`.
